title: Email verification (OTP) for new accounts
description: New accounts start unverified; system sends an OTP via Mailgun that the customer must confirm before full access.

inScope: Generate OTP on registration and send verification email via Mailgun
Verify OTP and mark account status as verified

acceptanceCriteria.text: A newly registered account starts in 'unverified' status
Customer receives a verification email with OTP/link after registering
Clicking/submitting a valid, unexpired OTP marks the account verified
